predicate.title: Finish leftover sweep: verify go.sum and Actions bump
predicate.problem: Two of the five leftovers registered in CR-20260715-001 were left for a human playbook: asdlc-verify had no Go toolchain available, so go.sum couldn't be generated, and the Actions-majors bump couldn't reach the asdlc-verify repo from this working directory.
acceptance_criteria: asdlc-verify's go.sum is generated and committed, and CI/action.yml stop running go mod tidy (asdlc-verify#2)
asdlc-verify's ci.yml and action.yml use actions/checkout@v7 and actions/setup-go@v6 (asdlc-verify#2)
leftover-verify-gosum and leftover-actions-node20 are marked status: done with Done: notes, and LEFTOVERS.md regenerates with no drift
